_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Prepare model documentation for production deployment, including model card, performance characteristics, known limitations, and monitoring recommendations.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. Task AI-T-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.437), OP-T-010 (OP, cosine: 0.425).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.7/10 (raw 0.469). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. NICE-only terms [baselines, configuration, establish, system] vs WIDAI-only terms [card, characteristics, deployment, documentation, known, limitations] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.877 (P=0.892, R=0.862). P exceeds R by 0.031 — the NICE element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 16 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Establish system configuration baselines" and "Prepare model documentation for production deployment, including model card, per" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.453 ≈ STS 0.469 (gap 0.016). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. NICE terms: [baselines, configuration, establish, system]. WIDAI terms: [card, characteristics, deployment, documentation, known, limitations].
